key_arguments: Aluminum pricing remains supportive relative to domestic expectations.
The stock's valuation lags the global aluminum theme.
Domestic demand could remain soft even if overseas aluminum names rerate.
Theme transmission into A-share multiples may remain incomplete.

key_risks: Policy beta fades faster than expected
risk_assessment.portfolio_impact: High beta to aluminum price expectations.

decision.rationale: The setup is interesting, but confirmation is still needed before a stronger expression.

key_disagreements: Whether external aluminum strength can re-rate mainland smelter names quickly.
invalidation_triggers: Shanghai aluminum breaks trend support while domestic demand indicators remain weak.
pair_basket_ideas: Long 601600.SS versus a downstream aluminum processor basket.
